title: feat: cloud-provider billing + key rotation (OpenRouter, DeepInfra, AWS credits)
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: The hive's accounting department
gist.blurb: We've wired up OpenRouter to our text gateway and taught our internal systems how to count cloud credits. Better routing for your prompts, and less manual math for us.
gist.summary: Added OpenRouter as a provider to the text generation gateway and updated internal finance tools for automated billing tracking and key rotation.
gist.impact: Users benefit from a more resilient text generation backend, while our infrastructure gets smarter about managing API keys and cloud credits.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about finance, billing, keys, and adding a new provider (OpenRouter). Visuals: The bee mascot acting as an accountant or managing glowing keys/coins. A retro computer showing charts or routing paths.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing glowing digital coins and golden keys on a wooden desk. A retro computer monitor in the background displays a green routing map. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
